notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper movement, shooting, shields, UFO, lives, scoring, and level progression; invader sprites are simplified pixel-art approximations rather than classic designs, but overall the game is complete and plays well.

A very solid and complete implementation, though it lacks a proper player death/respawn sequence (lives simply decrement on hit without resetting the board) and shield destruction is pixel-by-pixel rather than in chunks.
A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone, but simplified visuals, some control/pause quirks, and non-classic gameplay details keep it well short of a top-tier benchmark score.
